title: GatorCraft
description: Welcome to Gatorcraft! A Pokémon adventure within the world of Minecraft. Our server is built on the Generations sidemod for Cobblemon, bringing you the Pokémon experience with modern, models, expansive features, and the latest Pokémon
body:
New to Minecraft, or a veteran? Either way we have a place for you! AEMNetwork offers an immersive and enjoyable experience for all. Join us on a journey filled with exploration, friendship, and excitement.

If you need more information on each feature and mod, be sure to check out their respective wiki pages. We look forward to playing with you in the world of  GatorCraft on AEMNetwork!

Become a part of the family at  mc.aemnetwork.com

We are a Fabric based server running Cobblemon, and the Generations addon. 

 

Capture, train, and level up and trade your pokemons!
Cobblemon, lots and lots of Cobblemon.
You can trade and battle with your friends in multiplayer.
Daily rewards
Daily quests and tasks
Recommended to run with a minimum of 2.5 GB of memory. Use 3 GB or more for best performance.
